features: Bacofoil 20 Double Seal Safeloc Food & Freezer Bags Small 17x17cm
The unique stand alone bags make storing food and liquid a doddle!
description: Product Description Bacofoil 20 Double Seal Safeloc Food & Freezer Bags Small 17x17cm Directions ® Registered trademarks of a company of the Melitta Group Safety Warning 1 Once the bag is filled, pinch close one corner and run your fingers along the seal leaving a 2cm gap at the end. 2 Make sure all air removed from the bag and close the bag completely. 3 To open the SafeLoc® seal, hold the edges of the bag opening in the middle and simply pull!
